## Description
Describe the changes you made and the motivation behind them. Include any context or references to issues this PR addresses.

## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 Styling / Design updates (UI/UX enhancement)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (README, comments)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or build errors
- [ ] The build command (`npm run build`) runs successfully locally

## Screenshots / Demos
If applicable, add screenshots, GIFs, or video links to showcase the visual changes.
